posts.author: WeatherWatcher92
posts.text: Heads up everyone! The new community library at Oakwood Heights is officially opening its doors tomorrow, Saturday. We will be holding special events throughout the day and offering free Wi-Fi access starting at 9 AM. Pl
posts.explanation: The post contains benign public information about a community library opening, including event details and Wi-Fi availability. It does not contain any harmful content, URLs, or violations of policy, so it should be approved.
